explanations.3: GO is a batch separator in SQL Server that tells the database to execute all the commands written so far as one group.
explanations.11: IDENTITY(1,1) means the database will automatically assign each customer a unique ID starting at 1 and incrementing by 1 for each new row.
explanations.31: GO here executes the INSERT statement; without it, SQL Server wouldn't know you're done entering the data.
